description: Public-safe Phase 3 beta validation prompt set for real-use DeepResearch gates.
name: phase-3-public-beta-real-use-validation

prompts.prompt: Compare public approaches for deterministic software release validation and cite evidence-quality tradeoffs.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public project documentation and release engineering articles only.

prompts.prompt: Research public guidance on robots.txt, copyright, and citation handling for automated research tools.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public policy and documentation pages; no account or user data.

prompts.prompt: Compare public API rate-limit handling guidance across three developer APIs.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public API documentation and avoids credentials or tenant data.

prompts.prompt: Summarize public outage postmortem structures used by major cloud providers and identify evidence patterns.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public postmortems and status reports only.

prompts.prompt: Compare Python packaging reproducibility recommendations from public documentation and standards discussions.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public standards, packaging docs, and changelogs.

prompts.prompt: Research public recommendations for preventing cache poisoning in GitHub Actions workflows.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public security documentation and example workflows.

prompts.prompt: Compare public schema choices for linking report claims to source evidence in research or evaluation tools.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public documentation and open schema examples.

prompts.prompt: Analyze public browser automation guidance for producing stable website screenshots in CI.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public browser automation documentation and examples.

prompts.prompt: Compare public incident report templates for software reliability investigations.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public templates and documentation.

prompts.prompt: Research public guidance on validating generated reports against source-backed claims.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public evaluation and documentation sources only.

prompts.prompt: Compare above-the-fold public documentation screenshots for Python, Node.js, and Rust and cite visible layout differences.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public documentation pages and generated screenshots only.

prompts.prompt: Compare visible product page imagery for three public code editor products and cite image-backed differences.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public product pages and image metadata only.

prompts.prompt: Extract a supported visual claim from a public chart on an international organization or open-data report page.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public chart/report pages and avoids personal datasets.

prompts.prompt: Extract and cite one figure-level claim from a public open-access research paper PDF.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public open-access papers and generated figure/page artifacts only.

prompts.prompt: Compare public dashboard screenshots from observability product documentation and cite layout or chart differences.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public documentation screenshots and product pages only.

prompts.prompt: Compare visual evidence from public accessibility contrast examples and cite the image-backed observations.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public accessibility documentation and examples.

prompts.prompt: Research public plugin marketplace examples and optionally compare listing screenshots for onboarding cues.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public marketplace pages and screenshots only.

prompts.prompt: Compare public map visualization examples and optionally cite visual differences in legends or color scales.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public map examples and screenshots; no private location history.

prompts.prompt: Research public design-system documentation and optionally compare component screenshots for navigation patterns.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public design-system documentation and screenshots only.

prompts.prompt: Research public changelog pages and optionally compare embedded screenshots for feature announcement evidence.
prompts.public_safe_justification: Uses public changelogs and screenshots; no private release notes.
